status: v1 = manifest + installer skeleton; extraction from the monorepo in progress

embeddingServer.note: Runs today inside the monorepo; core-api owns the HTTP serving surface, asn-engine owns the encoder. Not yet cut into a standalone server.

evalHarness.note: Module imports cleanly and is exercised transitively by scripts/realtext_methods.py (verified). pyproject.toml declares testpaths=["tests"] but no tests/ directory exists yet in this package — no bundled unit test suite today.

tuningLoop.note: Runs today (verified: scripts/realtext_methods.py --smoke completes end-to-end) but is coupled to monorepo-only state: config/work_queue.json, TASKS.md, data/autoresearch/champion_train.py auto-revert. Needs decoupling from those conventions before it is a clean standalone extract.

skills.note: config/omni-skills/best_skill.md (Omni-Market trading skill, simulation-only) + apps/synthorg/agent/skills/{deploy-checklist,eval-gates,lifecycle,omni-market}.md exist and are readable today, but reference monorepo-specific paths (config/market-platforms.json, data/omni/trajectories.jsonl, /WHITEPAPER.md) that need generalizing for a standalone package.

llmWiring.note: No ollama/vllm/GLM integration code exists in the repo yet (verified: no matches under scripts/). Token-economics contract (cacheable static prefix, RAG-minimal context, BYOK per-turn metering, free/open models default) is specified in specs/0033-overworld.md but unimplemented.
